mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product(productNum, categoryNum, productName, special, price, discountRate, savedMoney, delivery, content, thumbnail, productShow, reg_date, md, starter, brandNum, deletion) VALUES (product_seq.NEXTVAL, #{categoryNum}, #{productName}, #{special}, #{price}, #{discountRate}, #{savedMoney}, #{delivery}, #{content, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{thumbnail}, 1, SYSDATE, #{md}, #{starter}, #{brandNum}, 0)
INSERT INTO productFile(fileNum, productNum, filename) VALUES(productFile_seq.NEXTVAL, #{productNum}, #{filename})

INSERT INTO productOption(optionNum, optionName, productNum, parentNum, parentName) VALUES (#{optionNum}, #{optionName}, #{productNum}, #{parentNum, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{parentName, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
INSERT INTO optionDetail(detailNum, optionNum, optionValue) VALUES(#{detailNum}, #{optionNum}, #{optionValue})
INSERT INTO brand(brandNum, brandName, showOrderNo, reg_date) VALUES(brand_seq.NEXTVAL, #{brandName}, #{showOrderNo}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT categoryNum, categoryName, use, showNo, parentNum FROM productCategory WHERE use = 1 AND parentNum IS NULL ORDER BY showNo
SELECT categoryNum, categoryName, use, showNo, parentNum FROM productCategory WHERE use = 1 AND parentNum = #{parentNum} ORDER BY showNo
SELECT brandNum, brandName FROM brand WHERE showBrand = 1 ORDER BY brandName

SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM product p
productShow != 0
AND p.categoryNum = #{categoryNum}
AND special = 1
AND starter = 1
AND md = 1
AND

SELECT p.productNum, categoryNum, productName, price, discountRate, brandName, productShow, reg_date, TO_CHAR(update_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') update_date, NVL(totalStock, 0) totalStock FROM product p LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT productNum, NVL(SUM(totalStock), 0) totalStock FROM productStock GROUP BY productNum ) t ON p.productNum = t.productNum
productShow != 0
AND p.categoryNum = #{categoryNum}
AND special = 1
AND starter = 1
AND md = 1
AND productShow = 1
AND showBrand = 1
AND
ORDER BY p.${listOrder} DESC, p.productNum DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH FIRST #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT f.*, b.brandName FROM (SELECT productNum, productName, special, price, c.categoryNum, discountRate, savedMoney, delivery, content, thumbnail, productShow, reg_date, updateDate, md, starter, deletion, brandNum FROM product p JOIN productCategory c ON p.categoryNum = c.categoryNum) f JOIN brand b ON f.brandNum = b.brandNum WHERE productNum = #{productNum}
SELECT detailNum, optionValue, optionNum FROM optionDetail WHERE optionNum = #{optionNum} ORDER BY detailNum
SELECT stockNum, detailNum, detailNum2, totalStock, p.productNum, productName FROM productStock s JOIN product p ON s.productNum = p.productNum WHERE p.productNum = #{productNum} ORDER BY stockNum
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO productStock(stockNum, totalStock, productNum, detailNum, detailNum2) VALUES(productStock_seq.NEXTVAL, #{totalStock}, #{productNum}, #{detailNum}, #{detailNum2})
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET productShow = #{productShow} WHERE productNum = #{productNum}

UPDATE product SET productName = #{productName}, price = #{price}, categoryNum = #{categoryNum}, discountRate = #{discountRate}, savedMoney = #{savedMoney}, delivery = #{delivery}, content = #{content}, thumbnail = #{thumbnail}, updateDate = SYSDATE, brandNum = #{brandNum} WHERE productNum = #{productNum}
UPDATE productOption SET optionName = #{optionName} WHERE optionNum = #{optionNum}
UPDATE optionDetail SET optionValue = #{optionValue} WHERE detailNum = #{detailNum}
